424.description: Failed to authenticate with the provided token.

404.description: The requested course could not be found.

422.description: You are already enrolled in this course.

404.description: The requested course could not be found.

parameters.name: filter[instructor-slug]
parameters.description: Filter courses by instructor slug (exact match).

parameters.name: filter[enrolled]
parameters.description: Filter to enrolled courses only (requires authentication).

parameters.name: filter[favorited]
parameters.description: Filter to favorited courses only (requires authentication).

400.description: The favoritable type must be either course or category.

404.description: The requested resource could not be found.

parameters.name: filter[name]
parameters.description: Filter instructors by display name (partial match, case-insensitive).

parameters.name: filter[course-name]
parameters.description: Filter orders by course name (partial match).

parameters.name: filter[instructor-name]
parameters.description: Filter orders by instructor name (partial match).

preferences.description: Object containing preference keys and their boolean values. Valid keys: PlayAudioInBackground, AutoPlayNextLecture.

errors.description: A detailed description of each field that failed validation.
